definition: person on trial (bị cáo)
example: the accused
collocations: the accused|accused of murder/theft

definition: [specialist]acidic, low-pH (có tính axit)|sour/sharp-tasting (có vị chua gắt)
example: Rye is tolerant of poor, acid soils.|acid (sour) fruit
collocations: acid soil/rain|acid taste/fruit

definition: [formal]public supporter or support publicly (người ủng hộ/ủng hộ công khai)
example: an advocate for hospital workers
collocations: advocate for sb/sth|strong/leading advocate|advocate the use of sth

definition: follow or obey rules/beliefs (tuân thủ)
example: Staff should adhere strictly to the safety guidelines.
collocations: adhere to rules/principles/guidelines|adhere strictly/closely to sth|adhere to a diet/method

definition: love and care (tình cảm/quý mến)
example: Children need lots of love and affection.
collocations: show/feel affection|love and affection|affection for sb

definition: strange or foreign (xa lạ/ngoại lai)|from outer space (ngoài hành tinh)
example: an alien (hostile) environment|alien life forms
collocations: alien environment/culture|alien to sb/sth|alien life/forms

definition: arrow weapon (cung)|loop knot (nơ)|violin stick (vĩ kéo đàn)
example: He was armed with a bow and arrow.|to tie your shoelaces in a bow|She drew the bow across the strings.
collocations: bow and arrow|draw/aim a bow|tie sth in a bow|violin bow

definition: bend head/body (cúi đầu/cúi chào)
example:
She gave a slight bow of her head in greeting.

He bowed low to the assembled crowd.
collocations: give/make/take a bow|bow your head|bow to sb|bow low/down

definition: admission of wrongdoing (lời thú nhận)
example: After hours of questioning by police, she made a full confession.
collocations: make a confession|full/false confession|confession of guilt|confession to sth

definition: dishonesty or moral decay (tham nhũng/tha hóa)
example: allegations of bribery and corruption
collocations: bribery and corruption|political/public corruption|fight/tackle corruption|corruption scandal

definition: make with skill (chế tác)
example: All the furniture is crafted (fashion) from natural materials.
collocations: craft sth from sth|carefully crafted speech/object

definition: money put in a bank or paid in advance (tiền gửi/tiền đặt cọc)|layer of material left or found somewhere (lớp trầm tích/lắng đọng)|put money somewhere formally (gửi/nộp tiền)
example:
Deposits (withdrawal) can be made at any branch.|mineral/gold/coal deposits

The rain left a deposit of mud on the windows.|Millions were deposited in Swiss bank accounts.
collocations: make/pay a deposit|bank deposit|mineral/gold/coal deposit|deposit of mud|deposit money/funds in an account

definition: prevent sb from having sth important (tước đoạt/làm cho ai đó thiếu thốn cái gì)
example: They were imprisoned and deprived of their basic rights.
collocations: deprive sb of sth|be deprived of rights/sleep/food|deprived area/childhood

definition: come from a source/origin (bắt nguồn từ)|get sth from a source (lấy/rút ra từ)
example: The word ‘politics’ is derived from a Greek word meaning ‘city’.|He derived great pleasure from painting.
collocations: derive from sth|be derived from sth|derive sth from sth|derive benefit/pleasure from sth

definition: give time/effort/resources to sth (dành/cống hiến)
example: I could only devote two hours a day to the work.
collocations: devote time/energy/attention to sth|devote yourself to sth|devote resources/space to sth

definition: between countries (ngoại giao)|tactful (khéo léo)
example: a diplomatic crisis|a diplomatic (tactful) answer
collocations: diplomatic relations/crisis/mission|diplomatic answer/way/skill

definition: city center area (trung tâm thành phố)
example: a downtown store
collocations: downtown area/store|go/work/live downtown

definition: how people or things interact (động lực/tương tác)
example: the dynamics of political change
collocations: group/family/social dynamics|dynamics of sth|market dynamics

definition: [biology]gradual development/change (sự tiến hóa/phát triển)
example: the evolution of the human species
collocations: evolution of sth|human/cultural evolution|theory of evolution

definition: [formal]leave or quit (rời/thoát)
example: We exited through a corridor into a back alley.
collocations: exit building/stage/vehicle|exit page/program|exit through sth

definition: remove or obtain sth (lấy ra/chiết xuất)
example: a machine that extracts excess moisture from the air
collocations: extract oil/minerals/DNA|extract sth from sth

definition: for all normal work/study hours (toàn thời gian)
example: students in full-time education
collocations: full-time job/work/student|full-time education|work full-time

definition: main land, not nearby islands (đất liền/lục địa chính)
example: mainland Greece/Europe
collocations: the mainland|on/to/from the mainland|return to the mainland|mainland of Europe

definition: during the time between events (trong lúc đó)|while something else is happening (trong khi đó)
example: I'll contact them soon. Meantime don't tell them I'm back.|Efforts to establish a ceasefire are increasing. Meantime the bloodshed continues.
collocations: meantime, + clause|in the meantime|in the meantime|for the meantime|the meantime
idioms: for the meantime/meanwhile :: for a short period of time but not permanently :: I'm changing my email address but for the meantime you can use the old one.$$in the meantime/meanwhile :: in the period of time between two times or two events :: My first novel was rejected by six publishers. In the meantime I had written a play.|The next programme starts in five minutes; in the meantime, here’s some music.

definition: book for notes (sổ tay/vở ghi)
example: The police officer wrote the details down in his notebook.
collocations: write in a notebook|keep/carry a notebook|spiral/school notebook

definition: care of sick people (nghề điều dưỡng/chăm sóc bệnh nhân)
example: a career in nursing
collocations: nursing care/profession/career|career in nursing

definition: less than a full schedule (bán thời gian)
example: She's looking for a part-time job.
collocations: part-time job/work|work/study part-time|part-time student

definition: legal process or event series (thủ tục tố tụng/diễn biến)
example: bankruptcy/divorce/extradition, etc. proceedings
collocations: legal/court/criminal proceedings|begin/bring proceedings|proceedings against sb

definition: alone or for one performer (solo/một mình)
example: his first solo flight
collocations: solo flight/album/career|go solo|solo artist/performance

definition: focus on one area (chuyên về)
example: Many students prefer not to specialize too soon.
collocations: specialize in sth|specialize as sth|highly specialized

definition: strong-tasting plant powder/seed (gia vị)
example: common spices such as ginger and cinnamon
collocations: add/use spices|ground/mixed spices|spice rack

definition: showing respect to god (thờ phụng)|strong love/respect (sự sùng bái)
example: an act/a place of worship|What she feels for him is akin to worship (adoration).
collocations: act/place of worship|morning/evening worship|ancestor worship|worship of sb/sth

definition: output or produce sth (sản lượng/tạo ra)|[formal]stop resisting (đầu hàng/nhượng bộ)
example: Higher-rate deposit accounts yield good returns.|After a long siege, the town was forced to yield (give way).
collocations: high/low crop yield|yield returns/results/fruit|yield to demands/pressure/temptation

definition: in a very short time (trong nháy mắt)
example: It was all over in the blink of an eye.
collocations: in the blink of an eye
idioms: in somebody’s eyes :: in somebody’s opinion or according to the way that they see the situation :: She can do no wrong in her father's eyes.|To Western eyes, it may seem that the city is overcrowded.

definition: secondary result of a process (sản phẩm phụ/hệ quả phụ)
example: One of the by-products of unemployment is an increase in crime.
collocations: by-product of sth|useful/unwanted by-product

definition: standard used to judge or decide sth (tiêu chí)
example: The main criterion is value for money.
collocations: main/key/important criterion|criterion for sth|meet/satisfy/fulfil a criterion

definition: make a system or government less stable (gây bất ổn/làm mất ổn định)
example: Terrorist attacks were threatening to destabilize the government.
collocations: destabilize a government/regime/country|destabilize the economy/region|politically destabilize

definition: estimate beyond known facts using current evidence (ngoại suy/suy ra từ dữ liệu)
example: The figures were obtained by extrapolating from past trends.
collocations: extrapolate from data/trends/results|extrapolate to sth|extrapolate figures/conclusions

definition: have the right to speak in a discussion (được quyền phát biểu)
example: The senator has the floor.
collocations: have/get/be given the floor|give sb the floor|take the floor
idioms: wipe/mop the floor with somebody :: to defeat somebody completely in an argument or a competition

definition: fasten to sth (móc/gắn)
example: We hooked the trailer to the back of the car.
collocations: hook sth to/onto sth|hook trailer|hook arm/leg around sth

definition: curved hanger (móc)
example: a picture/curtain/coat hook
collocations: coat/picture/curtain hook|hang sth on hook|fish hook

definition: tend to think or behave in a way (có xu hướng)|lean or slope in a direction (nghiêng/dốc)
example: I incline to the view that we should take no action at this stage.|The land inclined gently towards the shore.
collocations: incline to/towards a view|be inclined to do sth|incline towards/downwards|incline your head

definition: province/territory first minister (thủ hiến)
example: She was sworn in as premier last week.
collocations: acting/deputy/former premier|sworn in as premier|premier of sth

definition: make selection/order chance-based (ngẫu nhiên hóa)
example: The researchers randomized the order of the questions.
collocations: randomize the order/sequence|randomize patients/participants|randomized trial/study

definition: mention or cite as a source (dẫn chiếu/trích dẫn)
example: Each chapter is referenced, citing literature up to 2018.
collocations: reference a source/study/article|fully/carefully referenced|referenced in sth

definition: Japanese rice alcohol (rượu sake)
example: a bottle of sake
collocations: drink/serve sake|bottle/cup of sake
in accordance with rules/law/requirements|act in accordance with sth
idioms: in accordance with something :: as required by sth (theo đúng/phù hợp với) :: in accordance with legal requirements|We acted in accordance with my parents’ wishes.

definition: total made by adding amounts together (tổng số/tổng hợp)
example: a record aggregate of 285 points
collocations: aggregate of sth|record/total aggregate|in aggregate

definition: representing sb (thay mặt)
example: He began a petition in behalf of the farmers.
collocations: on behalf of sb|in behalf of sb
idioms: in behalf of somebody | in somebody’s behalf :: in order to help somebody :: He began a petition in behalf of the farmers.

definition: lower-ranked person (cấp dưới)
example: the relationship between subordinates (inferior) and superiors
collocations: subordinates and superiors|manage subordinates|junior/direct subordinate

definition: great praise and honour (vinh quang/sự tôn vinh)|great beauty (vẻ đẹp rực rỡ)
example:
Olympic glory in the 100 metres

‘Glory to God in the highest’|The city was spread out beneath us in all its glory.
collocations: win/achieve glory|glory to God|in all its glory

definition: related to math (thuộc toán học)
example: mathematical calculations/problems/models
collocations: mathematical calculation/problem/model|mathematical proof/analysis|mathematical ability

definition: numerical information (số liệu thống kê)|study of numerical data (môn thống kê)|single numerical fact (một con số thống kê)
example: Analysis of crime statistics showed high levels of violent crime within the area.|There is a compulsory course in statistics.|An important statistic is that 94 per cent of crime relates to property.
collocations: crime/official/statistics|collect/analyse statistics|course/degree in statistics|study statistics|important/key statistic|statistic that + clause

definition: product put on face/body to improve appearance (mỹ phẩm)
example: the cosmetics industry
collocations: use/apply cosmetics|cosmetics industry/company|skin/hair cosmetics
